transaction.program_or_reason: Iran — ITSR (Iran Transactions and Sanctions Regulations), 31 C.F.R. Part 560
transaction.originator_name_address: ABC Import Services, 4210 Industrial Blvd, Houston, TX 77001, United States
transaction.originating_fi: First National Bank, 100 Commerce Street, Houston, TX 77002, United States
transaction.intermediary_fi: Citibank N.A., 388 Greenwich Street, New York, NY 10013, United States
transaction.beneficiary_fi: Bank Melli Iran, Ferdowsi Avenue, Tehran, Iran

transaction.additional_relevant_info: Payment reference indicated settlement for industrial components, invoice INV-2026-0112.
transaction.additional_data: OBI field: payment for industrial components delivery Tehran March 2026

case_facts.sanctions_nexus: Beneficiary located in Iran; beneficiary financial institution Bank Melli Iran is itself a sanctioned entity

narrative: On March 6, 2026, the institution identified an attempted outbound wire transfer in the amount of USD 18,450 involving ABC Import Services as originator and Tehran Industrial Supply Co. as beneficiary, with the payment reference indicating settlement for industrial components. The transaction generated a sanctions alert during automated screening due to the beneficiary's location in Iran, a comprehensively sanctioned jurisdiction. Review of the payment message, invoice INV-2026-0112, customer account records, and sanctions screening output confirmed that the beneficiary was located in Iran and that the beneficiary financial institution, Bank Melli Iran, is itself a sanctioned entity. Based on the available information, the institution determined that the transaction could not be lawfully processed due to its involvement with a sanctioned jurisdiction and entity under the Iran Transactions and Sanctions Regulations (ITSR), 31 C.F.R. Part 560. The transaction was therefore rejected and was not processed. Relevant records, including the payment message, invoice, customer account records, and screening results, were retained in connection with the reporting process.
